purpose: Pre-approve bounded decisions so auto mode can run end to end without pausing for human approval.

agentMayChoose: repo-authored synthetic fixtures for tests and smoke runs
public or permissively licensed datasets documented with source, license, checksum when available, split, dedup, and leakage notes
tokenizer candidate that wins the committed tokenizer report against the phase metrics
architecture defaults already established in the phase plan
documented fallback only when required evidence proves compute, dependency, or hardware infeasibility
final project positioning based on evidence: achieved, partially achieved with documented fallback, or blocked
agentMustNotChoose: pretrained model wrappers in the scratch-core path
committing generated checkpoints, raw corpora, tokenized datasets, or ignored run directories

defaults.fixtureCorpus: repo-authored synthetic text unless a public-domain source is documented
defaults.tokenizerSelection: choose the candidate with the best documented English/Japanese tradeoff and no roundtrip failures
defaults.datasetPolicy: permissive/public sources only, with manifest evidence before training claims
defaults.scalePolicy: train kgpt-30m unless infeasible; fallback requires evidence, smaller run, and final write-up downgrade
defaults.mlxPolicy: implement MLX comparison unless infeasible; deferral requires blocker evidence and final write-up downgrade
defaults.finalClaimPolicy: do not call the original North Star fully achieved if 30M+ training or MLX comparison is deferred

fallbackEvidenceRequired: hardware, dependency, time, or data blocker
